name: Haiti
summary: During the period covered by the press cuttings, voodoo orgies multiplied in Haiti.
description:
Haiti appears among Professor Angell's press cuttings from the period of the 1925 disturbances: voodoo orgies multiplied there.

The cutting notes it in the same breath as the ominous mutterings reported from African outposts — part of the worldwide pattern the professor's collection traced.

sources.quote: Voodoo orgies multiply in Haiti, and African outposts report ominous mutterings.
